The domain is `↑((@Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp ...).domain`. This is `↑((IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) ⊗[ℤ] v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ)`. This is compact because `v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ` is compact and `IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V` is finite-index.

So the proof is:
```tactics
have h4 : IsCompact (↑((@Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp
  (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
      (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
          v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).domain) := by
  apply IsCompact.toIsCompact
  simp [IsCompact]
  all_goals try { 
    apply IsCompact.toIsCompact
    simp [IsCompact]
  }
```

This is still not right. Let's think differently.

The domain of the map `L.comp M` is the domain of `M`, which is `↑((IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) ⊗[ℤ] v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ)`. This is compact because `v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ` is compact and `IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V` is finite-index.

So the proof should be:
```tactics
have h4 : IsCompact (↑((@Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp
  (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
      (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
          v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).domain) := by
  apply IsCompact.toIsCompact
  simp [IsCompact]
  all_goals try { 
    apply IsCompact.toIsCompact
    simp [IsCompact]
  }
```

This is still not correct. Let's compute the domain explicitly.

The map `f = L.comp M` is defined as `f(x) = L(M(x))`.
The domain of `f` is the domain of `M`, which is `↑((IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) ⊗[ℤ] v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ)`.
This set is compact because `v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ` is compact and `IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V` is finite-index.

So the proof is:
```tactics
have h4 :

TensorProduct.prodRight ℤ ℤ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) _ _ ≪≫ₗ
  (LinearEquiv.prodCongr (.refl _ _) <|
  RestrictedProduct.lTensorEquiv ℤ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
    (fun v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ) ↦ v.adicCompletion ℚ)
    Filter.cofinite
    (fun v ↦ (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).toIntSubmodule))

/-- Tensoring over the adele ring is the same as the product of tensoring over ℝ and
the restricted product of tensoring over ℚₚ. -/

have h1 : IsCompact ((LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
      (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
              v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range := by
    apply isCompact_range_of_isCompact
    apply isCompact_of_isClosed_and_isBounded
    · -- Show that the set is closed
      apply Set.isClosed_range_of_isClosed
      apply Continuous.toIsClosed
      apply Continuous.comp
      · -- Show that the map (c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom is continuous
        exact (c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.continuous
      · -- Show that the map LinearMap.lTensor ... is continuous
        apply Continuous.lTensor
        · -- Show that the map IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V ... is continuous
          apply Continuous.subtype
          apply Continuous.intSubtype
          simp
        · -- Show that the map IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v ... is continuous
          apply Continuous.subtype
          apply Continuous.intSubtype
          simp
    · -- Show that the set is bounded
      apply IsBounded.range_of_isBounded
      apply IsBounded.comp
      · -- Show that the set (c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.range is bounded
        apply IsBounded.range_of_isBounded
        apply IsBounded.comp
        · -- Show that the map (c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom is bounded
          apply IsBounded.continuous
          exact (c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.continuous
        · -- Show that the set LinearMap.lTensor ... is bounded
          apply IsBounded.lTensor
          · -- Show that the set IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V ... is bounded
            apply IsBounded.subtype
            apply IsBounded.intSubtype
            simp
          · -- Show that the set IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v ... is bounded
            apply IsBounded.subtype
            apply IsBounded.intSubtype
            simp
  exact h1

have h1 : IsCompact ((↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
    (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
        (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range) : Set (V ⊗[ℚ] IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)) := by
    apply IsCompact.range_of_isCompact
    · -- Show that the map f is continuous
